prompt: A tank holds 0.9 cubic meters of water when full and is currently 40% full. A pump adds water at 2.5 liters per second while, at the same time, a drain removes water at 0.7 liters per second. After how many MINUTES is the tank completely full? Reply with the number only.
notes: verify_answers.py: 540 L needed / 1.8 L/s net = 300 s = 5 min. Traps: m^3->L conversion, 40% full vs 40% empty, net rate, s->min.
